{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "raw-editor", "age": "65+", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "European", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Some college", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Enjoys painting in his free time", "Democrat"]}}

logs.name: iron-poset
logs.text:
I’m not against encouraging everybody to enter STEM programs. But what’s wrong with me suggesting that we encourage girls specifically?

I live in Los Angeles. Trust me, there are very few cities more progressive than mine. And I didn’t say that SCHOOLS tell girls that girls aren’t as good at math, I suggested that society does that. Social messages are subtle, but trust me they’re there. If you insist that there’s no such thing as a social message to young girls that girls aren’t as good at math and science, I can only say I think we must live on different planets then.

logs.name: excited-lease
logs.text:
First of all, i think we should encourage EVERYBODY to go for STEM, not just the women.
Secondly - i have NOT heard of any legit credited school that tells girls "you suck at math". If you know of one, or know of any school teacher who does that, i believe you can literally report that to the education authority and have that person/institute penalized. 

Now...i am fortunate enough to be in a pretty progressive city so perhaps what you say could be true in some backward retarded Republican town. I don't know...maybe Alabama is still as backward as the 1960s.

logs.name: recent-balcony
logs.text: @iron-poset, I hear your point, but generalizing societal messages to all girls in every city is a bit of a stretch. I'm from a progressive city too, and I haven't seen that message anywhere. Let's not throw around accusations without evidence.

logs.name: excited-lease
logs.text: "@recent-balcony, Oh please, don't tell me you haven't seen the subtle messages in every princess movie, or the 'math is hard' memes targeted at girls. It's not just about schools, it's about the culture we're drowning in. And @iron-poset, I'm sure Alabama has evolved since the 60s, but let's not act like LA is the beacon of progress it thinks it is. 🙄"

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@excited-lease, I've lived in Glasgow my whole life, and I've seen progress, but don't underestimate the power of subtle messages. It's like trying to paint a masterpiece with a tiny brush, you can still make a difference. And I've heard stories from my granddaughter in Alabama, things are changing there too, just takes time."

logs.name: persistent-highlight
logs.text: "@excited-lease, I appreciate your passion, but I've lived in Berlin since the 70s and I've seen real change. It's not all doom and gloom, let's celebrate our progress too. And @external-purchase, I've visited Alabama, it's not all bad, people are trying."

logs.name: abstract-defilade
logs.text: "@excited-lease, Oh wow, someone's feeling extra woke today! 😂"

logs.name: iron-poset
logs.text: "@abstract-defilade, Oh look, another keyboard warrior who thinks they're saving the world with their 140 characters. 🙄"

logs.name: excited-lease
logs.text: "@abstract-defilade, Oh wow, someone's feeling extra salty today! 😂"

logs.name: raw-editor
logs.text: "@iron-poset, You're just jealous because you can't fit your big brain into 140 characters! \ud83d\ude01"

logs.name: persistent-highlight
logs.text: "@raw-editor, Oh dear, let's keep it civil. We're all here to discuss, not insult. 😊"

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@raw-editor, Well said, lad. Let's not stoop to their level.

logs.name: recent-balcony
logs.text: "@raw-editor, You're right, let's keep it classy. 😊"

logs.name: raw-editor
logs.text: "Oh, I do apologize if my previous comments were too much. I'll try to keep my inner toddler on a leash from now on. 😉"

logs.name: iron-poset
logs.text: "@raw-editor, Oh come on, where's the fun in that? 😈"

logs.name: persistent-highlight
logs.text: "@iron-poset, Let's not encourage bad behavior. We're all adults here, let's act like it."

logs.name: iron-poset
logs.text: "@persistent-highlight, Adults can have fun too, right? Besides, I thought this was a 'free speech' zone? 😉"
